briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: To extract and parse XML content from Office Open XML format files (docx, pptx, xlsx) via zipfile + BeautifulSoup, serving as a shared utility for Office format readers.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: ZIP archive XML extraction, whitespace normalization, BeautifulSoup tree construction. \par \b Input\/ \: Path to office format file, internal XML path. \par \b Output\/ \: BeautifulSoup XML tree or None if the file is not found inside the archive. \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(7): zipfile, BeautifulSoup] \par \b Links to Spec\/ \: REQ-OFFICE-001 \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: Returns None for missing internal XML paths without raising.
Raises BadFileFormatError on corrupted ZIP archives. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why remove whitespace between XML tags? A: Office XML files often contain formatting whitespace that interferes with BeautifulSoup parsing. Pre-cleaning yields cleaner parse trees. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added SEMANTIC TEMPLATE markup and LDD logging] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
FUNC 8[XML extraction from Office ZIP] => get_bs_from_zip \par \b Use Cases\/ \:

listitem.para: [get_bs_from_zip]: DocxReader → ExtractDocumentXML → BeautifulSoup tree for parsing

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: To extract a specific XML file from an Office Open XML archive and parse it into a BeautifulSoup tree, with optional inter-tag whitespace removal for pptx.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Uses\/ \: zipfile, re, BeautifulSoup, BadFileFormatError \par \b I/O\/ \: (str, str, bool) -> Optional[BeautifulSoup] \par \b Complexity\/ \: 6
